name: String Length
description: Returns the length of the provided text.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

async def execute(self, inputs):
    text = inputs.get('text') or self.get_parameter('text', '')
    try:
        length = len(str(text))
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_info(f'String length error: {e}')
        length = 0

    await self.set_output('length', length)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'length': length}
